title: rubus × obtectus
intro: Rubus × obtectus, also known as Thimbleberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, combining the characteristics of the red raspberry and the thimbleberry. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × obtectus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
